scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:frontend: cd frontend && npm test || echo "No tests in frontend"
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && npm test || echo "No tests in backend"
